strategy_evaluation.disclaimer: Indicative only. One month of paper data is not enough to conclude a strategy works. No weights were changed automatically during the month.

future_readiness.item: Phase 1: Paper trading running (email + GitHub Pages, ₹0 cost)
BrokerAdapter abstraction in place (paper enabled, Angel One stub disabled)
Angel One adapter disabled by config
Manual approval required for any real order
Phase 3: Limited real execution, delivery+limit only (future)
Phase 4: Controlled automation w/ kill switch (future)

readiness.note: Readiness describes evidence maturity only. v1 stays paper-trading regardless of this verdict.
